title: checks.json (per-panel)
description: Per-panel rules-trace ledger written by skills/comic-production/scripts/checks_ledger.py::write_checks_ledger(). One file per panel at projects/<proj>/pages/panels/panel-<panel_id>/checks.json. This is the only artifact that already uses `schema_version` as the version field — the canonical convention to standardize on.

schema_version.description: Currently pinned to 1 by SCHEMA_VERSION in checks_ledger.py line 31. Bumping requires a coordinated migration of every projects/*/pages/panels/*/checks.json on disk.

transformation_type.description: Mirrors production-config.transformation_type. Defaults to 'fmg' in the writer if absent from the plan.

shotlist_snapshot_sha.description: 16-char sha256 prefix of shotlist.json at write time. Null if shotlist.json is missing.

composed_prompt.description: Full generation prompt emitted by next_panel.compose_prompt(). May be null if the panel was written via a path that did not compose a prompt (rare).

accepted_variant_label.description: e.g. 'v3'. Set by the runner after variant selection; null at compose-time.

rules.description: Map of rule_id (e.g. 'L17', 'L22', 'L1.5') to its trace entry. Schema does not enumerate keys — rule set evolves.

status.description: Canonical writer values per next_panel.py: `pass`, `fail`, `pending` (post_render default before vision-audit runs), `blocked` (when pre_render failed and post_render couldn't be evaluated), `skipped` (rule not applicable to this panel), `n/a`. `skip` is a tolerated alias for `skipped`.

message.description: Drift-tolerated alias for `reason` (some older traces use this key).
